purpose: Define and realize the first real enrichment-side adapter execution contract for semantic diff interpretation downstream of deterministic Git fact capture.

ordering_rules: sem must run only after deterministic diff capture succeeds
semantic_diff output must preserve an explicit upstream_deterministic_input reference
review_basis output must remain downstream and non-authoritative
output_invariants: semantic grouping does not overwrite canonical repo_state or diff_state
review basis artifacts remain reproducible from the same upstream diff input
semantic interpretations remain structurally separated from Git facts

required_checks: upstream diff input exists and is named in the report
semantic_diff emission succeeds on codex_home inputs
review_basis emission succeeds and remains downstream-only
deterministic replay on unchanged upstream diff produces identical outputs

allowed_now: report fields that distinguish minimal from real enrichment execution
not_yet_allowed: running sem before gix diff capture
treating review_basis output as canonical Git state

implementation_artifacts.runtime_resolution: resolve against the checked-out ataraxy/sem source tree before falling back to PATH
